metric_caveats: This full-validation run promotes temporal-candidates verify-repair v1.1 after cap-25 gate cleared at runs/gan_s0_qwen35b_temporal_candidates_verify_repair_cap25_guardrails_validation_20260519T183213Z (44% monthly on 25 records, 100% schema, 100% evidence).

Compare benchmark-facing metrics to Qwen direct guardrails full validation runs/gan_s0_qwen35b_direct_full_validation_guardrails_20260519T102249Z (55.9% monthly, 99.6% evidence) and hosted quality anchor runs/gan_s0_verify_repair_full_validation_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T084732Z (65.4% monthly, 92.7% evidence).
Temporal candidates are deterministic diagnostic hints; gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring is unchanged.
Verify-repair doubles model calls versus direct extraction; latency is not comparable to direct-only runs.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, temporal-candidate coverage, and verifier decisions are diagnostic.
Promotion expectation: schema >= 95%, evidence >= 99%, monthly materially above direct full-validation baseline where comparable.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
